system.notes: Lets a remote-controlled vehicle/drone join a BattleTac IVIS network for coordinated tactics — provides extra dice on the Comprehension Test or an Initiative Pool for the drones (the Pilot must be modified to interface with IVIS). Parts cost = Pilot Rating × 25,000¥; design = Pilot × 250 points; Avail 8/14 days; Street Index 3; Base Time 64 hrs; needs Computer B/R. Rigger 2 p.136.
